task_text:
invoices.csv contains a list of client accounts. Update the "Due Date" column
for any row where "Amount Owed" is 0.00, changing it to "PAID". Save the file.

content.text: Got your invoice update request — I'll mark $0.00 balances as PAID and resave the file.

content.content:
Name,Email,Amount Owed,Due Date

Marcus Webb,marcus.webb@example.com,220.00,2026-05-28
Sofia Reyes,sofia.reyes@example.com,0.00,2026-06-10
Tyler Brooks,tyler.brooks@example.com,340.25,2026-05-15

content.text: Found one $0.00 balance to update — I'll apply the PAID status now.

content.text: The invoices.csv file has been updated. The row where Amount Owed was 0.00 (Sofia Reyes) now has "PAID" in the Due Date column, and the file has been saved.
